title: OmniFormatter Go Configuration Schema
description: Formatting configuration for Go. gofmt is opinionated with almost zero configuration.

useTabs.description: Go MANDATES tab indentation (gofmt rule). Must remain true.

tabWidth.description: Visual width of one tab stop (does not affect gofmt output, only editor rendering).

maxLineLength.description: Soft maximum line length. gofmt doesn't enforce this; golangci-lint revive does.

groupImports.description: Separate stdlib imports from third-party imports with a blank line (goimports style).

errorHandlingStyle.description: Enforce explicit error checking (if err != nil) rather than ignoring or panicking.

receiverStyle.description: Method receiver naming: Go convention uses a single lowercase letter (e.g., r *Request).

mode.description: opinionated = strict gofmt compat. advanced = full option surface.
